# LaCrosse WS6868 weather station (TX231RW, TX232TH-LCD)
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/3120
#
# All codes below are the full FSK_PCM demodulated bitstream (preamble
# included, untrimmed) for a real transmission -- rtl_433's own -X flex
# demod was used to extract them, matching src/devices/lacrosse_ws6868.c's
# own bitbuffer_search()-based preamble handling. TX232TH-LCD readings are
# verified digit-for-digit against the sensor's own displayed temperature
# and humidity (issue #3120, @ProfBoc75); TX231RW's wind/rain payload is
# unconfirmed and reported as data_raw (see README.md and the file's own
# doc comment).

# TX232TH-LCD/g002_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{220}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000002057a071dc00000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g003_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000002457e06e36000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g004_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000002858206f0e000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g005_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000002c58406c06000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g006_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{218}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000003058606cf000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g007_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{220}ffffffc00000000aaaaaaaad2aa2dd41000001a2c40364400000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g008_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000003858a06c46000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g009_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000003c58c06b8a000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g010_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffffc00000000aaaaaaaad2aa2dd4100000102c7035be000000000
# TX232TH-LCD/g011_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{221}ffffff80000000155555555a5545ba82000002458e06b72000000000
# TX231RW/g001_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce214050000628005557b3f0
# TX231RW/g002_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140600006280055571360
# TX231RW/g003_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140700006280055500c68
# TX231RW/g004_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140000006280055565240
# TX231RW/g005_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140100006280055514d48
# TX231RW/g006_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce214020000628005551edf8
# TX231RW/g007_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce214030000628005556f310
# TX231RW/g008_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce214040000628005550acd8
# TX231RW/g009_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce214050000628005557b3f0
# TX231RW/g010_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140600006280055571360
# TX231RW/g011_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140700006280055500c68
# TX231RW/g012_868.3M_1000k.cu8
{171}1555555555695516ea0ce2140000006280055565240
